final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement screenshot for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout simulating a phone screenshot, visual impact prioritized
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as hero product, centered and prominent
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-contrast, visually striking atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium brand-reveal direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-tech surface treatment — exact finish and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro" (large, primary hero text), "OPPO" (wordmark/logo placement)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format, full-bleed with no device frame, brand-exposure campaign style
Avoid:
